title: American Express Plans Live Audio Webcast of Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call

The webcast will be accessible to the general public through the American Express Investor Relations website at https://ir.americanexpress.com/. title: Amex Card Delinquencies Creep Up but Remain Below Pre-COVID Levels
text: American Express says its credit card delinquency rates remain below pre-pandemic levels. As the company said in a Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing Friday (Sept. 15) the company's consumer card delinquency rate crept up to 1.2% in August, from 1.1% in July but still below 1.4% recorded in August 2019.

title: American Express Vs. S&P 500
text: American Express Company is a large financial corporation known for its iconic products, but its stock performance is less than impressive, given the elevated volatility. The company has growth opportunities in younger customer segments and international markets. American Express' commitment to premium offerings and partnerships showcases its competitive edge, but its high volatility and competition raise concerns.
